target: Citation-compliance audit: add 'as of [date]' labels to all truly-undated dome-source citations in data/sections.json (ISS-2039)
scope_summary: Full audit pass over all dome-source citations (john09289.github.io/predictions) in data/sections.json. Methodology: (1) found all URL instances; (2) checked for any YYYY-MM-DD date within 150 chars of each URL; (3) applied 'truly-undated' definition (no date at all nearby, not just no exact 'as of' phrase). Result: 42 total dome citations, 3 nav links (OBE — bare root URL, no data claim), 2 already-dated with explicit 'as of' phrases, 17 having nearby dates via other phrasing (e.g. '(2026-04-17)' in following text, 'first captured 2026-04-18'), 20 truly-undated. Applied 14 patch operations to address all 20 undated instances. Post-patch: 0 truly-undated non-nav dome citations remain.

date_sources.live.html: 2026-04-17 (first seen in monitor/changes/chg-20260417-1620-003.json; confirmed 'first captured 2026-04-18' in surrounding prose)

patches_applied.description: 3 inline claim_index.json semicolon-separated citations: URL; → URL, as of 2026-05-17;
2 formula_runtime.json href links: add (as of 2026-04-08) after
3 predictions.html href links: add (as of 2026-04-17) after or in surrounding text
2 claim_index.json href links (code-wrapped and plain): add (as of 2026-05-17) after
4 remaining inline citations (predictions.html and claim_index.json after data/predictions.json refs): add , as of YYYY-MM-DD before )

obe_resolutions.description: 3 bare-root nav links (https://john09289.github.io/predictions/) — navigation-only, no data claim, no date needed
17 citations with nearby dates via non-standard phrasing already satisfied the reproducibility intent

cross_ref_note: ISS-1191 and EXP-398/EXP-399 addressed the Part 8b commitment-language side of this issue. This EXP executes the audit pass those EXPs deferred. No follow-up EXP needed for the citation audit; ISS-2039 can close.
summary_for_decider: ISS-2039 resolved. Full citation audit pass complete: 20 truly-undated dome-source citations in sections.json all received 'as of YYYY-MM-DD' date labels (14 patch operations). 3 nav links confirmed OBE. 17 citations already had nearby date context. All changes applied directly to data/sections.json; run build.js to regenerate HTML. Tests pass (3647/3647). No verdict change, no wins.json change.
